data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding no-show handling, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this aspect. The linked use case mentions the need for different handling of no-shows compared to direct bookings, yet there is no evidence in the prior steps that addresses this requirement directly. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding the validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of no-shows differently from direct bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the no-show handling requirement.
